introSection: Verrücktwärts is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

fullText:
Verrücktwärts is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany.



Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.
